title: Principal Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
